name: MeshVertexColorList
summary: Provides access to the vertex colors of a mesh object.

methods.name: Add(Color)
methods.summary: Adds a new vertex color to the end of the color list.

params.name: color
params.doc: Color to append, Alpha channels will be ignored.

returns.doc: The index of the newly added color.

methods.name: Add(Int32, Int32, Int32)
methods.signature: public int Add(int red, int green, int blue)
methods.summary: Adds a new vertex color to the end of the color list.

params.name: red
params.doc: Red component of color, must be in the 0~255 range.

params.name: green
params.doc: Green component of color, must be in the 0~255 range.

params.name: blue
params.doc: Blue component of color, must be in the 0~255 range.

returns.doc: The index of the newly added color.

methods.name: AppendColors
methods.summary: Appends a collection of colors to the vertex color list. For the Mesh to be valid, the number of colors must match the number of vertices.

returns.doc: true on success, false on failure.

methods.name: Clear
methods.summary: Clears the vertex color list on the mesh.

methods.name: CreateMonotoneMesh
methods.summary: Constructs a valid vertex color list consisting of a single color.

params.name: baseColor
params.doc: Color to apply to every vertex.

returns.doc: true on success, false on failure.

methods.name: Destroy
methods.summary: Releases all memory allocated to store vertex colors. The list capacity will be 0 after this call. Subsequent calls can add new items.

methods.name: GetEnumerator
methods.summary: Gets an enumerator that yields all colors in this collection.

methods.name: SetColor(Int32, Color)
methods.signature: public bool SetColor(int index, Color color)
methods.summary: Sets or adds a vertex to the Vertex List. If [index] is less than [Count], the existing vertex at [index] will be modified.If [index] equals [Count], a new vertex is appended to the end of the vertex list.If [index] is larger than [Count], the function will return false.

params.name: index
params.doc: Index of vertex color to set. If index equals Count, then the color will be appended.

params.name: color
params.doc: Color to set, Alpha channels will be ignored.

returns.doc: true on success, false on failure.

methods.name: SetColor(MeshFace, Color)
methods.signature: public bool SetColor(MeshFace face, Color color)
methods.summary: Sets a color at the three or four vertex indices of a specified face.

params.name: face
params.doc: A face to use to retrieve indices.

returns.doc: true on success; false on error.

methods.name: SetColor(Int32, Int32, Int32, Int32)
methods.signature: public bool SetColor(int index, int red, int green, int blue)
methods.summary: Sets or adds a vertex color to the color List. If [index] is less than [Count], the existing vertex at [index] will be modified.If [index] equals [Count], a new vertex is appended to the end of the vertex list.If [index] is larger than [Count], the function will return false.

params.name: index
params.doc: Index of vertex color to set. If index equals Count, then the color will be appended.

params.name: red
params.doc: Red component of vertex color. Value must be in the 0~255 range.

params.name: green
params.doc: Green component of vertex color. Value must be in the 0~255 range.

params.name: blue
params.doc: Blue component of vertex color. Value must be in the 0~255 range.

returns.doc: true on success, false on failure.

methods.name: SetColors
methods.summary: Sets all the vertex colors in one go. For the Mesh to be valid, the number of colors must match the number of vertices.

returns.doc: true on success, false on failure.

methods.name: ToARGBArray
methods.summary: Return colors as an array of integers with packed ARGB values

properties.name: Capacity
properties.summary: Gets or sets the total number of vertex colors the internal data structure can hold without resizing.

properties.name: Count
properties.summary: Gets or sets the number of mesh colors.

properties.name: Item
properties.summary: Gets or sets the vertex color at the given index. The index must be valid or an IndexOutOfRangeException will be thrown.

properties.name: Tag
properties.summary: Gets or sets a mapping information for the mesh associated with these vertex colors.
